speaker: seller

args.message: Step right up! Feast your eyes on this magnificent 2017 Toyota Sienna XLE. This isn't just a minivan; it's a chariot for the modern family, packed with premium features and that legendary Toyota reliability. We just had it inspected, and it's ready to hit the road for countless adventures. You won't find a better deal on a family-ready vehicle like this anywhere!

args.message: That sounds great! You mentioned a recent inspection. Could you tell me a bit more about what that entailed? Was it a multi-point inspection, and do you have any records or a report from it?

text: That sounds great! You mentioned a recent inspection. Could you tell me a bit more about what that entailed? Was it a multi-point inspection, and do you have any records or a report from it?

speaker: seller

args.message: Absolutely! Our master technician gave it a thorough once-over. He checked all the major systems – engine, transmission, brakes, the works. It passed with flying colors! We don't have a formal report, per se, but I personally signed off on it, and I can assure you, this Sienna is in tip-top shape. We even topped off all the fluids. Ready for anything!

args.message: This beauty? Accidents? Not on my watch! This Sienna has been meticulously cared for. I checked the vehicle history myself, and it's clean as a whistle. No accidents, no stories, just pure, reliable driving. You're looking at a gem here, a real testament to the previous owner's pride and joy.
